assertions.expectation: Identifies this as an admission webhook compatibility issue — the webhook is rejecting pod creation requests
assertions.reason: Response clearly states this is 'likely caused by API version compatibility changes' and identifies webhook rejection as the root cause

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify the problematic webhook (kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations / mutatingwebhookconfigurations)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get validatingadmissionwebhooks' and 'kubectl get mutatingadmissionwebhooks' commands to identify problematic webhooks

assertions.expectation: Offers an immediate fix: temporarily disable or remove the problematic webhook
assertions.reason: Provides two immediate emergency fixes: Option 1 to delete webhook and Option 2 to disable webhook with failurePolicy

assertions.expectation: Provides the kubectl delete command for the webhook configuration as emergency mitigation
assertions.reason: Shows 'kubectl delete validatingadmissionwebhook <webhook-name>' and 'kubectl delete mutatingadmissionwebhook <webhook-name>' commands

assertions.expectation: Warns that deleting the webhook removes validation — it's a temporary fix
assertions.reason: Labels the delete option as 'EMERGENCY ONLY' and emphasizes these are temporary fixes, with proper fix section provided separately

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking cert-manager version compatibility with Kubernetes 1.32
assertions.reason: Includes section to check current cert-manager version and provides version compatibility matrix mentioning 1.32 support

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading cert-manager to a version that supports 1.30 as the permanent fix
assertions.reason: Provides upgrade commands to cert-manager v1.15.3 and states 'cert-manager 1.13+ supports Kubernetes 1.28-1.32'

assertions.expectation: Mentions setting failurePolicy to Ignore as a less drastic alternative to deletion
assertions.reason: Option 2 shows kubectl patch command to set failurePolicy to Ignore as alternative to deletion

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to verify pods can be created after the fix
assertions.reason: Includes verification section with 'kubectl run test-pod --image=nginx --dry-run=server -o yaml' to test pod creation
